title: AutoUpdate does not work in quadlet
body:
### Issue Description

When you add AutoUpdate=registry to a .kube file and reload, the service is not present anymore.

Based on the information on this page (https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.html) it seems to me that the field is supported

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Create an .kube file and accompanying .yml file 
2. Run systemctl --user daemon-reload
3. Run systemctl --user start <servicename>
4. Service is started

IF you add AutoUpdate=Registry to the same .kube file and repeat the steps above, you get Failed to restart <servicename>.service: Unit <servicename>.service not found.


### Describe the results you received

Failed to restart <servicename>.service: Unit <servicename>.service not found.

### Describe the results you expected

Successful restart of the service

comments.body:
@thyeestes, I just tried with the latest Podman from the development branch and it works.  Note that the `AutoUpdate` field for `.kube` files did not make it into the 4.6 release.  So Quadlet should error out when parsing this file.

The `podman info` output indicates you're using `4.6.0`.  Can you clarify?

@vrothberg I've just tried this on podman `4.6.0` and the journal prints:
> Aug 09 11:57:58 dhcp-2-149.tlv.redhat.com (sd-executor)[309481]: /usr/lib/systemd/user-generators/podman-user-generator failed with exit status 1.
Aug 09 11:57:58 dhcp-2-149.tlv.redhat.com systemd[309482]: quadlet-generator[309482]: converting "auto-udpate.kube": unsupported key 'AutoUpdate' in group 'Kube' in /home/ygal/.config/containers

I do wonder why the [4.6.0 documentation](https://docs.podman.io/en/v4.6.0/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.html) includes this option if the feature did not make the cut

> I do wonder why the [4.6.0 documentation](https://docs.podman.io/en/v4.6.0/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.html) includes this option if the feature did not make the cut

The 4.6 docs only show it for the [container] table AFAICS. The link mentioned in the issue (https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.html) is pointing to the `latest` docs which is the main branch.

you need to go to the stable link in the bottom right corner for the released version: https://docs.podman.io/en/stable/markdown/podman-systemd.unit.5.html (see https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/17233)

Thanks all. 

In the release notes of 4.6.0 ( which is marked a latest, so a bit confusing with the doc links) is states Quadlet now supports the AutoUpdate option.

I assumed it was supported by quadlet on both .kube and .container files.

Apparently not :-) I'll keep the auto update option in my .yml file for now.
Thanks, @thyeestes, and sorry for the confusion!
No worries thanks for the support
